docket_entries.description: MASTER COURT CALENDAR OF MAY-23-2011 ASSIGNED TO COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON MAY-23-2011 AT 9:45 AM IN DEPT. 501, RONALD E QUIDACHAY. TIME ESTIMATE: 2 HOURS - 1/2 DAY. JUDGE: KATHERINE FEINSTEIN; CLERK: E. BURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

ASSIGNED TO D501 FOR UNLAWFUL DETAINER COURT TRIAL. WITNESSES SWORN AND EXAMINED. DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE INTRODUCED. REMOVED FROM COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON MAY-23-2011. THE COURT RULES PLTF. ENTITLED TO POSSESSION OF PREMISES LOCATED AT 533 GONZALEZ DR., SF, CA. LEASE FORFEITED. SEE JUDGMENT FOR BACK RENT AND DAILY PER DIEM DAMAGES. EXHIBITS RETURNED.
